executives.name: George Kurian
executives.background: George Kurian has served as our Chief Executive Officer since June 2015 and as a director since June 2015. He also served as our President from May 2014 to June 2015. Mr. Kurian joined NetApp in April 2011 as Senior Vice President, Storage Solutions Group and was promoted to Executive Vice President, Product Operations in September 2013. Prior to joining NetApp, Mr. Kurian was Vice President and General Manager, Application Networking and Services Group at Cisco Systems from 2002 to 2011. He also held roles at Akamai Technologies, McKinsey & Company and Oracle Corporation.

executives.name: Michael Berry
executives.background: Michael J. Berry has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer since March 2020. Prior to joining NetApp, Mr. Berry served as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer of McAfee, LLC from February 2017 to March 2020. From September 2015 to January 2017, he served as Executive Vice President, Chief Financial Officer and Chief Operating Officer at FireEye, Inc.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer

executives.name: Elizabeth O'Callahan
executives.background: Elizabeth M. O'Callahan has served as our Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary since April 2022. She joined NetApp in 2013 and has held various leadership roles in the legal department, including Senior Vice President and General Counsel. Prior to NetApp, she was in private practice at Silicon Valley law firms.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President, Chief Legal Officer and Corporate Secretary

executives.name: Harvinder Bhela
executives.background: Harvinder S. Bhela has served as our Executive Vice President and Chief Product Officer since January 2022. Prior to joining NetApp, Mr. Bhela spent 24 years at Microsoft Corporation, where he most recently served as Corporate Vice President of the Microsoft 365 Security, Compliance and Management business.

tenure_dates.title: Executive Vice President and Chief Product Officer

executives.name: Cesar Cernuda
executives.background: Cesar Cernuda has served as our President since July 2020. Prior to joining NetApp, Mr. Cernuda spent 23 years at Microsoft Corporation, where he most recently served as Corporate Vice President, Microsoft Corporation and President, Microsoft Latin America.

board_of_directors.name: Michael Nevens
board_of_directors.background: T. Michael Nevens has been a member of our Board since December 2009 and was appointed Chairman of the Board in May 2015. He is a retired director of McKinsey & Company, where he led the Global High Tech Practice.

board_of_directors.name: George Kurian
board_of_directors.background: George Kurian has served as our Chief Executive Officer since June 2015 and as a director since June 2015.

board_of_directors.name: Deepak Ahuja
board_of_directors.background: Deepak Ahuja has been a member of our Board since February 2020. He is currently the Chief Financial Officer of Zipline International Inc. and previously served as CFO of Tesla, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Gerald Held
board_of_directors.background: Gerald Held has been a member of our Board since December 2009. He is the Chief Executive Officer of Held Consulting Group, LLC.

board_of_directors.name: Deborah Kerr
board_of_directors.background: Deborah L. Kerr has been a member of our Board since November 2017. She was previously the Executive Vice President and Chief Product and Technology Officer of Sabre Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Carrie Palin
board_of_directors.background: Carrie Palin has been a member of our Board since February 2021. She is currently the Senior Vice President and Chief Marketing Officer of Cisco Systems, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Scott Schenkel
board_of_directors.background: Scott F. Schenkel has been a member of our Board since November 2017. He previously served as the interim Chief Executive Officer of eBay Inc.

board_of_directors.name: George Shaheen
board_of_directors.background: George T. Shaheen has been a member of our Board since June 2004. He was previously the Chief Executive Officer of Siebel Systems, Inc.
